{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Akura ships
| introduced = Bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Hundreds or thousands of people escaped on [[Akura ships]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18">''Bloodline'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
